gdrive.title: Google Drive Sync
gdrive.description: Back up and restore your game progress using your Google account.
gdrive.gsiErrorDescription: Google Sign-In client has not loaded yet. Please try again in a moment.
gdrive.notSignedInDescription: Please sign in to use the cloud sync feature.
gdrive.syncSuccessDescription: Your data has been successfully backed up to Google Drive.
gdrive.restoreNoFileDescription: No backup file was found in your Google Drive.
gdrive.restoreSuccessDescription: Your data has been restored from the backup dated:
gdrive.restoreConfirmDescription: This will overwrite your current local data with the data from your cloud backup. This action cannot be undone.

language.title: Language
language.description: Switch the display language of the application.
